name: Mermaid on a Rock
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a graceful mermaid sitting on a smooth ocean rock, long wavy hair flowing down her back, a curving scaled tail draped over the side, hands resting gently behind her, gentle waves and a couple of starfish at the base of the rock

name: Cute Baby Mermaid
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a chubby cheerful baby mermaid with big sparkly eyes and a small round face, short curly hair, a little chubby scaled tail curling beneath her, tiny hands clapping, a few round bubbles floating around her, simple and adorable

name: Swimming Mermaid
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a mermaid swimming gracefully through the water with her long hair streaming behind her, arms reaching forward, her scaled tail flicked up in motion, trailing bubbles and a small fish swimming alongside

name: Mermaid and Dolphin
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a smiling mermaid floating beside a friendly leaping dolphin, one hand gently touching the dolphin's nose, her long tail curving below, a scatter of bubbles and a couple of small fish around them

name: Mermaid Princess with Crown
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: an elegant mermaid princess wearing a tall seashell-and-pearl crown, long flowing hair with a few small starfish tucked in it, a beaded seashell top, hands folded gracefully, a long detailed scaled tail with a flowing fin

name: Mermaid Tail Close-Up
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a large close-up of a curving mermaid tail filling the page, rows of overlapping scales in neat patterns, a wide flowing fan-shaped fin at the end, a few small bubbles and a starfish resting against it

name: Mermaid with Seahorse
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a young mermaid holding hands with a curly-tailed seahorse friend, both smiling, her hair drifting in the water, a curved scaled tail beneath her, a few strands of seaweed and bubbles around them

name: Mermaid in the Coral Reef
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a mermaid resting among a colorful coral reef full of fan corals, sea anemones, and swaying seaweed, several little fish darting around her, her long tail tucked to one side, bubbles rising to the top

name: Mermaid Treasure Chest
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a curious mermaid leaning over an open treasure chest spilling with pearls, jewels, and a string of beads, her eyes wide with delight, a sunken anchor and a few seashells nearby on the ocean floor

name: Easy Mermaid for Toddlers
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a very simple smiling mermaid with big round shapes, a round happy face, a few thick wavy lines of hair, a plain rounded tail with just a few large scales, two big bubbles beside her, thick clear shapes easy for little hands

name: Mermaid Blowing Bubbles
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a playful mermaid with cheeks puffed, blowing a stream of round bubbles that float up across the page, her tail flicked happily behind her, long hair swirling, a tiny fish chasing the bubbles

name: Dancing Mermaid
subject: fantasy/mermaid
prompt: a mermaid posed as if dancing in the water, arms raised gracefully overhead, body curved in a flowing arc, her long hair and the wide fin of her tail sweeping in motion, sparkles and bubbles around her
